## TRM1.5. Vertical flight efficiency of the climb (PI#8) {#trm1.5.-vertical-flight-efficiency-of-the-climb-pi8 .Heading-2-TZ}

Compared to the overall RP4 average value (34.8 seconds per flight), average times flown level during climb are on average 15.3 seconds per flight higher in Italy. The highest average time flown level during climb happens at Roma Urbe (LIRU) (164 seconds per flight), while the lowest happens at Pantelleria (LICG) (12.2 seconds per flight).
